_note: Headline = median of 3 independent runs on the target VPS (2 vCPU). Per-run raw data: fndsa_precompute_profile_run_1.json..run_3.json. run_1 is a low-saving outlier (see docs/p0-penjelasan.md P0-2/P0-3); local_dev file is a 4-core laptop run kept only for method validation, not a thesis figure.
